user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the Confirmation Management Module, so that I can control whether confirmation features are available in the HRMS
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the Confirmation Management Module?" and click Save; Then the module setting is applied

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save the setup and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can continue configuring the confirmation process in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Setup screen; When I click Save & Next; Then my selection is saved and I am taken to the next configuration step

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel the setup without saving, so that I can discard unintended changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I have changed the module setting on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then no changes are saved
